news.title: DNOW Earnings Miss Estimates in Q1, Revenues Increase Y/Y
news.text: DNOW misses Q1 earnings estimates despite surging revenues, as higher costs and expenses weigh heavily on profitability.

news.title: DNOW (DNOW) Q1 Earnings Lag Estimates
news.text: DNOW (DNOW) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.01 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.05 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.22 per share a year ago.

news.title: ROSEN, A HIGHLY RECOGNIZED LAW FIRM, Encourages DNOW Inc. Investors to Inquire About Securities Class Action Investigation - DNOW
news.text: New York, New York--(Newsfile Corp. - May 4, 2026) - WHY: Rosen Law Firm, a global investor rights law firm, continues to investigate potential securities claims on behalf of shareholders of DNOW Inc. (NYSE: DNOW) resulting from allegations that DNOW may have issued materially misleading business information to the investing public. SO WHAT: If you purchased DNOW securities you may be entitled to compensation without payment of any out of pocket fees or costs through a contingency fee arrangement.

news.title: DNOW Inc. (DNOW) Faces Investor Scrutiny Amid Reality Check Against November Comments About MRC Global ERP Issues, Stock Down 19% On News – Hagens Berman
news.text: SAN FRANCISCO, April 28, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) --  Investors in DNOW Inc. (NYSE: DNOW), a leading distributor of PVF, pumps and fabricated equipment, saw the price of their shares fall about 19% on February 20, 2026 after reporting its Q4 and FY 2025 financial results and revealing surprising, adverse, information. The developments have prompted national shareholder rights firm Hagens Berman to commence an investigation into whether DNOW's disclosures before February 20 may have violated federal securities laws.

news.title: Watsco (WSO) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
news.text: Watsco (WSO) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.87 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.73 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.93 per share a year ago.

news.title: ZenaTech Completes Acquisition of NOW Solutions Inc., Expanding its Enterprise SaaS Division with Government and Public Sector Customers and Strengthening Recurring Revenue Growth
news.text: VANCOUVER, British Columbia, April 14, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- ZenaTech, Inc. (Nasdaq: ZENA) (FSE: 49Q) (BMV: ZENA) ("ZenaTech"), a technology solution provider specializing in AI (Artificial Intelligence) drones, Drone as a Service (DaaS), enterprise SaaS, and Quantum Computing solutions, announces the acquisition of all material assets of NOW Solutions Inc., a Richardson, Texas-based, HR and payroll software company with a long-standing list of customers including schools, hospitals, municipal organizations, and government entities across the U.S. and Canada. The material assets of the Human Resource Management System (HRMS) company, which serves small to mid-market-sized customers with workforces of 1000 to 20,000 employees, was acquired through a bankruptcy sale process under U.S. bankruptcy law. This acquisition adds a recurring revenue business with decades-long customer relationships, further strengthening ZenaTech's Enterprise SaaS division and portfolio of software companies and brands.
